scripts.test:security: npm run prepare:scanners && snyk test --json-file-output=SCANNERS/snyk.json && npx snyk-to-html -i SCANNERS/snyk.json -o SCANNERS/snyk.html
scripts.test:sast: npm run prepare:scanners && semgrep scan --config auto --sarif --output SCANNERS/semgrep.sarif
scripts.test:dast: npm run prepare:scanners && docker run --rm --user root -v "%cd%\SCANNERS:/zap/wrk" -t ghcr.io/zaproxy/zaproxy:stable zap-baseline.py -t http://host.docker.internal:3000 -r relatorio-dast.html
scripts.test:all: npm run lint && npm run test:sast && npm run test:security && npm run test:dast
